roles.prompt: a focused lead phrase that carries the emotional identity without crowding the vocal
short fill phrases placed only in the gaps, with intentional silence after each phrase
a recurring signature motif with stable melodic identity and controlled repetition
brief answering phrases that respond to the vocal or main melody without copying it literally
a restrained counter-melody that supports the main line and avoids harmonic conflict
a continuous harmonic foundation with no lead melody and no attention-seeking movement
a short transition gesture that connects sections without becoming a standalone motif

sounds.technique: natural breath detail, finger-hole transitions, restrained vibrato, subtle quarter-tone bends, human rubato
real bow pressure, expressive slides, natural pitch instability, microtonal Iraqi phrasing, intimate live articulation
real risha articulation, deep wooden body resonance, natural string buzz, short-neck fretless phrasing, human timing

sounds.nameEn: original hybrid digital pluck shaped for Iraqi melodic phrasing
sounds.technique: non-guitar transient, soft asymmetric attack, microtonal pitch movement, Iraqi ornament logic, sparse motif design, no preset ethnic timbre

sounds.nameEn: custom monophonic hybrid lead with Iraqi phrasing
sounds.technique: controlled portamento, maqam-aware pitch inflections, restrained vibrato, breath-like envelope, expressive micro-dynamics, no western EDM phrasing
soft sustained voicings, restrained movement, warm bell tone, low-density harmonic support, no soloing
slow attack, long release, subtle harmonic motion, wide but stable stereo field, no rhythmic pulse, no lead contour
tight kick, crisp restrained snare, controlled hi-hat detail, clean transient shape, humanized syncopation, no Arabic percussion pattern
soft evolving noise, restrained harmonic shimmer, wide stereo ambience, no melody, no rhythm, no obvious riser shape

identities.prompt: authentic Iraqi melodic identity with restrained quarter-tone phrasing, maqam-informed ornamentation, deep longing, and intimate human expression
contemporary Iraqi identity combining authentic maqam phrasing with refined modern pop production and no commercial Arabic-pop clichés
a warm Baghdad-night atmosphere with elegant urban melancholy, low density, and spacious modern production
southern Iraqi emotional character with raw acoustic expression, rural warmth, and deeply human microtonal phrasing
neo-pop production with refined Khaleeji influence, elegant rhythmic restraint, and premium contemporary sound
Mesopotamian emotional identity with organic acoustic detail, spacious dynamics, and ancient emotional gravity
contemporary Eastern identity with subtle microtonality, clean production, and no generic oriental presets
organic pop built from live expression, understated harmony, natural timing, and low-density arrangement
alternative art-pop with sparse orchestration, unusual restraint, and emotionally precise movement
global hybrid production combining modern pop clarity with authentic Iraqi phrasing and premium studio realism

emotions.prompt: nostalgia, old memories, and quiet sadness
intimate, heartfelt, and deeply personal emotion
tender romantic warmth with controlled emotional expression
dark melancholy and controlled emotional tension

sections.prompt: designed for the intro with a clear opening identity and enough space for the next section
designed to sit between vocal phrases in the verse without masking the singer
designed to build controlled tension before the chorus
designed to support the chorus with a stronger emotional lift while preserving vocal space
designed for the bridge with a fresh but coherent emotional color
designed for the ending with a restrained unresolved final gesture
